blocks.content:
As you deploy more Alloy collectors, managing each configuration one host at a time becomes hard. Grafana Fleet Management is a Grafana Cloud feature for managing collector deployments at scale.

With Fleet Management, you can manage configurations across collectors from a central hub, create and adjust configuration pipelines remotely, and view health dashboards for your fleet.

Open the **Inventory** tab to view registered collectors.

If no collectors appear yet, that's fine for this introduction. Fleet Management becomes useful after Alloy is installed and registered.
You learned where Fleet Management lives and why it matters when you operate Alloy at scale.
In the next milestone, you choose practical next steps for hands-on Alloy learning.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your path, you can explore the following topics:

- [Introduction to Fleet Management](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/send-data/fleet-management/introduction/)
- [Monitor collector health using Grafana Fleet Management](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/fleet-mgt-monitor-health/)
